zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Sutton於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾素頓--爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Sutton46歲，母親Agnes de Hotham32歲。她和Piers de Maulay至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1392年10月10日在英國英格蘭越可爾約克享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Sutton于大约1350年出生在英国英格兰越可爾素頓--爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Sutton46岁，母亲Agnes de Hotham32岁。她和Piers de Maulay至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1392年10月10日在英国英格兰越可爾約克享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Sutton was born about 1350, in Sutton-on-Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Sutton, was 46 and her mother, Agnes de Hotham, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Piers de Maulay. She died on 10 October 1392, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Sutton est née environ 1350, à Sutton-on-Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Sutton, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Hotham, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Piers de Maulay. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1392, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Sutton um 1350 in Sutton-on-Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Sutton 46 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Hotham 32. Sie hatte mit Piers de Maulay mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1392 im Alter von 43 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Sutton è nata il circa 1350 nel Sutton-on-Hull, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Sutton, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Hotham, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Piers de Maulay. Morì il 10 ottobre 1392, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Suttonが約1350年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスットオン-オン-ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Suttonは46歳，母Agnes de Hothamは32歳であった。彼女はPiers de Maulayとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1392年10月10日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Sutton(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 수토--훌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Sutton(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Hotham(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Piers de Maulay(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 10월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Sutton nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Sutton-on-Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Sutton, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Hotham, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Piers de Maulay. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1392, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Sutton родилась около 1350 г. в местности суттон-он-хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Sutton было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Hotham, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Piers de Maulay. Она умерла 10 октября 1392 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
